intended_use: AI-Rad Companion Engine is a software platform that provides basic visualization and enables external post-processing extensions for medical images used for diagnostic purposes. The software platform
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion Engine is a software platform that provides basic visualization and enables external post-processing extensions for medical images used for diagnostic purposes. The software platform is designed to support technicians and trained physicians in qualitative and quantitative measurement and analysis of clinical data.
